title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 91.810 - May provide for payment by special assessment
text:
91.810.  May provide for payment by special assessment. — All such cities are hereby authorized and empowered to construct such rapid transit improvement, or any part thereof, or cause the same to be constructed, and to provide for the payment thereof, in part, by special assessment, in the manner and to the effect that such cities may now or hereafter be authorized to provide for special assessments for local improvements.
(RSMo 1939 § 7777) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7637
